creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

While using the port I noticed that some things related the qtconsole
function were missing from my upgrade.

The attached patch will enable qtconsole (if !WITHOUT_X11) and fix 
incorrect checking for py-zmq (ours is at 2.1.10, which breaks the 
simple string comparisons used here), which is needed by ipcluster.

Added file(s):
- files/patch-IPython_parallel_____init____.py
- files/patch-IPython_zmq_____init____.py

--- ipython-py27-0.11.patch begins here ---
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/devel/ipython/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.35
diff -u -u -r1.35 Makefile
--- Makefile	13 Apr 2011 09:14:28 -0000	1.35
+++ Makefile	9 Nov 2011 21:40:11 -0000
@@ -6,23 +6,31 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	ipython
-PORTVERSION=	0.10.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.11
  CATEGORIES=	devel python
-MASTER_SITES=	http://ipython.scipy.org/dist/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://archive.ipython.org/release/${PORTVERSION}/
  PKGNAMESUFFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMESUFFIX}

  MAINTAINER=	wen@FreeBSD.org
  COMMENT=	An enhanced Interactive Python shell

-RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pexpect.py:${PORTSDIR}/misc/py-pexpect
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/_sqlite3.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlite3
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/pexpect.py:${PORTSDIR}/misc/py-pexpect \
+		${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/_sqlite3.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-sqlite3 \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pyzmq>=2.1.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-pyzmq \
+
+.if !defined(WITHOUT_X11)
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}qt4-gui>=0:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/py-qt4-gui \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}qt4-svg>=0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/py-qt4-svg \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pygments>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-pygments
+.endif

  USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
+
+MAN1=		ipcluster.1 ipcontroller.1 ipengine.1 iplogger.1 \
+		ipython.1 irunner.1 pycolor.1

-MAN1=		ipython.1 pycolor.1 \
-		ipcluster.1 ipcontroller.1 \
-		ipengine.1 ipython-wx.1 \
-		ipythonx.1 irunner.1
  MANCOMPRESSED=	yes

  .ifndef	NOPORTDOCS
